description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.2 Docker image and defines a single lint stage. Add a rubocop job in the lint stage that runs `gem install rubocop -v '~> 1.0'` then `rubocop --format json --out rubocop_report.json --config .rubocop.yml` using a configuration that includes all `**/*.rb` files, excludes `spec/**/*`, `test/**/*`, `vendor/**/*`, `.bundle/**/*`, sets `max_files` to 5000 and enables only safe cops. Cache the `.bundle` directory to speed up gem installation. Store the generated `rubocop_report.json` as an artifact and make the job run on all branches except tags.
